name: Easiest Ever Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chocolate chips and peanut butter into a microwave-safe dish.
2. Microwave on high for 1-2 minutes, until the chips have completely melted.
3. Add the sweetened condensed milk; stir until the mixture is of a uniform consistency.
4. Pour the mixture into an 8" x 8" square pan lined with wax paper.
5. Refrigerate until firm.
6. Cut into 1-inch pieces.
Yield: 1 1/2 pounds or 16 servings
